TheFlesh.PsychicRitual_PurgeMechanitesPl.label: purge mechanites
TheFlesh.PsychicRitual_PurgeMechanitesPl.description: Make an appeal to a dark archotech to deactive all twisted mechanites nearby. As the twisted mechanites are by archotech design, a great offering is needed for appeasement.
TheFlesh.PsychicRitual_PurgeMechanitesPl.outcomeDescription: A successful ritual will remove any carrier of Twisted Mechanites from the area.
